task_description: Generate web-video-presentation rollout artifacts from Loop Engineering repository source
target_system_prompt: External VideoSkillOpt rollout harness. Target rollout model: gpt-5.3-codex. Skill under test: web-video-presentation. Persist source, script, outline, and evaluation artifacts under the rollout contract. If presentation is not generated, mark partial with hard=0 and fail_reason=presentation_not_generated_yet.
target_user_prompt: Run topic4 rollout for https://github.com/cobusgreyling/loop-engineering. Materialize source to article.md from README and visible repo structure, then produce script.md and outline.md using web-video-presentation principles. Save all required rollout artifacts in step_0003/predictions/topic4 and mark status partial_rollout_source_script_outline when presentation is not implemented.
